title: polystichum munitum subsp. imbricans
intro: Polystichum munitum subsp. imbricans, also known as western sword fern, is a subspecies of fern native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, making it a potential treatment for conditions like bronchitis and asthma. Western sword fern can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it has also been used in salves and poultices for topical application.
